title: From V4 to V5, our hybrid automated trading tool.
author: No_Page5992
selftext:
Hey everyone, as several people were interested last time I'd thought to share our next milestone as well.

To start off on the right foot:  
This is not a full automated trading bot!  
This tool is meant to be used upon your own analysis for the best experience.  
It is meant to be used as an execution model, including extra safety measurements.  
This created a extra safety net, and you'll not be needed anymore on the lower timeframes, as you'd only be needed to turn the bot on, or off in specific area's.

So now...:  
OrcaBot V5 is now live.

One of the biggest improvements in V5 is not that it seeks more trades, but avoiding less probable trades.

After severe tests one thing became very clear, which was that OrcaBot performs best during clean, structured trends.  
It performed worst during consolidations and weak trend conditions, OR extreme impulsive moves we know XAUUSD haves.

So instead of forcing trades in every environment, V5 now filters out these conditions and simply stays out of the market when structure becomes unfavorable.

If you look at the 2 tests i've ran, you'll see that the period is 5.5 months long on xauusd.  
This specific move is a bullish move overall, and the bot has been set on longs only for the entire time during london and new york sessions.  
The first picture is V5, second one is V4.  
You see correlations between the 2, but you can clearly see how V5 protects itself in unfavorable conditions, which V4 did not.  


The results are:  
\- Cleaner trend execution  
\- Reduced exposure during chop  
\- Stronger overall equity performance  
\- Nearly double the ROI in these tests simply by avoiding bad conditions

The main focus points of V5 were:  
\- Avoid consolidations?  
\- Avoid weak trend conditions  
\- Improve trend quality filtering  
\- Trade cleaner structured momentum only  
\- Reduce emotional/manual overmanagement

Trading should not be about constantly being in the market.  
Sometimes the highest-quality decision is doing nothing until conditions become favorable again, which I think V5 now truly starts to do.  
I am extremely excited with this update.

If you're interested in OrcaBot or would like to learn more about how the system works, feel free to send me a message, or simply leave a comment here.  
Happy to answer anything.

Oh, and yes..  
Because it is a hybrid system, meaning you'd still need to decide yourself when to turn the bot on or off, and in what direction.  
And on top of that, the bot is extremely versatile because of the settings it has.  
You'd be able to use a aggressive mode in which you'd be more in control, or a safer mode which the bot trades true quality setups only.

Because of this, each experience will be different, and thus we have indeed decided to sell it as well, as we believe with all the feedback, we will have the ability to create something special eventually as updates will keep coming, every user will have access to our server as well.

My last point:  
Because the trading industry is so intoxicated with scams and other horrendous activities, I am HIGHLY in favor in having a call with anyone who is interested.   
This will grant me the ability to consult this specific person, get to know each other, and actually show and explain YOU what we have, and what we are on about.  
Please give me the ability to do so, as it is extremely hard for us to actually stand out here..

Thank you all!

comments.author: Swirling__Mist
comments.body: This reads and sounds like a scam. Run!

replies.author: No_Page5992
replies.body:
You must have a hard time reading don't you?  
You're saying this, let me have a call with you, in the hopes you might delete this comment.

replies.author: Swirling__Mist
replies.body:
Hit a nerve huh? If this is legit, you will share full details here on Reddit, links to the working app to try or test, multiple screenshots and a full detailed writeup describing exactly what it is and how it works instead of trying to lure your marks off Reddit for "private" conversations. 

Nice try though...not...

replies.author: No_Page5992
replies.body:
Full details would be way too much to compille in a single post.  
A live call is obviously the best way to show people what we're on about, and answer all of their questions.  
We do this call BEFORE anyone decides anything.  
This is exactly what I meant with my last note lmao, but you do you buddy.

replies.author: Swirling__Mist
replies.body:
Too much to compile in a reddit post? Tell that to all of the legitimate developers who write massive reddit posts detailing their project in great detail, with screenshots, project links, dynamic discussions in their reddit thread, etc.

If you are too lazy to even follow basic marketing strategies, your "product" is mediocre at best, and your strategy scammy to the max. 

Stop trying to scam people and get a real job.

replies.author: No_Page5992
replies.body:
You're here commenting on a post, but are not willing to actually see with your own eyes.
Says more about you than whatever you say in your comments here in my opinion.

Smart people only obtain a certain attitude after seeing something with their own eyes, especially when offered and provided.

I wish you all the best, have a great rest of the day mate!🙏
